tracks.title: Python Engineering
tracks.goal_zh: 写出可维护的后端工程代码

skills.title: Config & Environment
skills.why: Production apps need env-based config, not hardcoded values
skills.why_zh: 生产应用需要基于环境的配置，不能硬编码

skills.title: Type Annotations
skills.why: Type hints catch bugs early and improve IDE support
skills.why_zh: 类型注解能提前发现 bug 并改善 IDE 支持

skills.title: Async Programming
skills.why: Async enables handling concurrent I/O without threads
skills.why_zh: 异步编程能并发处理 I/O 而无需多线程
skills.minimum_code:
import asyncio
import httpx

async def fetch(url: str) -> str:
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        resp = await client.get(url)
        return resp.text

skills.title: Error Handling
skills.why: Proper error handling prevents crashes and provides clear diagnostics
skills.why_zh: 正确的错误处理能防止崩溃并提供清晰的诊断信息

skills.title: Unit Testing
skills.why: Tests catch regressions and document expected behavior
skills.why_zh: 测试能捕获回归问题并记录预期行为

tracks.title: FastAPI Services
tracks.goal: Build production-ready REST APIs with FastAPI
tracks.goal_zh: 用 FastAPI 构建生产级 REST API

skills.title: Routing
skills.why: RESTful routing is the foundation of any API service
skills.why_zh: RESTful 路由是任何 API 服务的基础

skills.title: Schema Validation
skills.why: Request/response validation prevents bad data from entering the system
skills.why_zh: 请求/响应验证能防止错误数据进入系统
skills.minimum_code:
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

class Item(BaseModel):
    name: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
    price: float = Field(..., gt=0)
    tags: list[str] = []

skills.title: Dependency Injection
skills.why: DI makes services testable and decouples components
skills.why_zh: 依赖注入使服务可测试并解耦组件

skills.title: Middleware
skills.why: Middleware handles cross-cutting concerns like auth, logging, CORS
skills.why_zh: 中间件处理认证、日志、CORS 等横切关注点
skills.minimum_code:
from fastapi import Request
from starlette.middleware.base import BaseHTTPMiddleware

class TimingMiddleware(BaseHTTPMiddleware):
    async def dispatch(self, request: Request, call_next):
        response = await call_next(request)
        response.headers['X-Process-Time'] = '0.1'
        return response

skills.title: Server-Sent Events
skills.why: SSE enables real-time streaming of LLM responses to clients
skills.why_zh: SSE 能将 LLM 响应实时推送给客户端

tracks.title: LLM API Client
tracks.goal: Build reliable clients for LLM APIs with proper error handling
tracks.goal_zh: 构建可靠的 LLM API 客户端，具备完善的错误处理

skills.title: API Call
skills.why: Every LLM app starts with making a correct API call
skills.why_zh: 每个 LLM 应用都从正确的 API 调用开始

skills.title: Timeout & Retry
skills.why: LLM APIs are slow and unreliable; timeout and retry prevent hangs and transient failures
skills.why_zh: LLM API 速度慢且不稳定；超时和重试能防止卡死和临时故障

skills.title: Error Boundary
skills.why: Separating network, HTTP, parse, and business errors enables precise handling
skills.why_zh: 区分网络、HTTP、解析和业务错误能实现精确处理

skills.title: Streaming
skills.why: Streaming shows tokens as they arrive, improving perceived latency
skills.why_zh: 流式响应在 token 到达时立即显示，降低感知延迟

skills.title: Cost Tracking
skills.why: LLM API costs add up fast; tracking usage prevents budget surprises
skills.why_zh: LLM API 成本增长很快；追踪用量能避免预算超支

tracks.title: RAG System
tracks.goal_zh: 构建检索增强生成流水线

skills.title: Document Parsing
skills.why: RAG starts with extracting clean text from various document formats
skills.why_zh: RAG 的第一步是从各种文档格式中提取干净的文本
skills.minimum_code:
import fitz  # PyMuPDF

def parse_pdf(path: str) -> str:
    doc = fitz.open(path)
    text = ''
    for page in doc:
        text += page.get_text()
    return text

skills.title: Chunking
skills.why: Proper chunking balances context richness with retrieval precision
skills.why_zh: 合理的分块在上下文丰富度和检索精度之间取得平衡
skills.minimum_code:
def chunk_text(text: str, size: int = 200, overlap: int = 50) -> list[str]:
    chunks = []
    start = 0
    while start < len(text):
        end = start + size
        chunks.append(text[start:end])
        start = end - overlap
    return chunks

skills.title: Embedding
skills.why: Embeddings convert text to vectors for semantic similarity search
skills.why_zh: 嵌入将文本转换为向量，用于语义相似度搜索
skills.minimum_code:
from openai import OpenAI

def get_embedding(text: str, client: OpenAI) -> list[float]:
    resp = client.embeddings.create(
        input=text,
        model='text-embedding-3-small'
    )
    return resp.data[0].embedding

skills.title: Retrieval
skills.why: Efficient vector retrieval finds the most relevant chunks for a query
skills.why_zh: 高效的向量检索能为查询找到最相关的文本块

skills.title: Reranking
skills.why: Reranking improves retrieval quality by re-ordering initial results with a cross-encoder
skills.why_zh: 重排序通过交叉编码器重新排列初始结果，提升检索质量
skills.minimum_code:
from sentence_transformers import CrossEncoder

reranker = CrossEncoder('cross-encoder/ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2')

def rerank(query: str, passages: list[str], top_k: int = 3) -> list[str]:
    pairs = [(query, p) for p in passages]
    scores = reranker.predict(pairs)
    ranked = sorted(zip(passages, scores), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
    return [p for p, _ in ranked[:top_k]]

skills.title: Evaluation
skills.why: Measuring retrieval quality (precision, recall) is essential for RAG improvement
skills.why_zh: 衡量检索质量（精确率、召回率）对 RAG 优化至关重要

tracks.title: Agent Engineering
tracks.goal: Build autonomous agents with tool use, planning, and memory
tracks.goal_zh: 构建具备工具调用、规划和记忆能力的自主 Agent

skills.title: Tool Calling
skills.why: Tool calling lets agents interact with external systems and APIs
skills.why_zh: 工具调用让 Agent 能与外部系统和 API 交互

skills.title: Planner
skills.why: Planners decompose user intent into actionable tool calls
skills.why_zh: 规划器将用户意图分解为可执行的工具调用

skills.title: Executor
skills.why: Executors run planned steps, handle errors, and chain results
skills.why_zh: 执行器运行规划步骤、处理错误并链接结果

skills.title: Guardrails
skills.why: Guardrails prevent agents from taking dangerous or unauthorized actions
skills.why_zh: 安全护栏防止 Agent 执行危险或未授权的操作

skills.title: Memory
skills.why: Memory lets agents maintain context across interactions
skills.why_zh: 记忆让 Agent 能在多次交互中维持上下文

tracks.title: Deployment & Quality
tracks.goal: Ship reliable software with CI/CD, monitoring, and testing
tracks.goal_zh: 通过 CI/CD、监控和测试交付可靠的软件

skills.title: Docker
skills.why: Docker ensures consistent environments from dev to production
skills.why_zh: Docker 确保从开发到生产环境的一致性
skills.minimum_code:
FROM python:3.11-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
COPY . .
EXPOSE 8000
CMD ['uvicorn', 'main:app', '--host', '0.0.0.0']

skills.title: CI/CD
skills.why: CI/CD automates testing and deployment, catching issues before production
skills.why_zh: CI/CD 自动化测试和部署，在进入生产前发现问题
skills.minimum_code:
# .github/workflows/ci.yml
# name: CI
# on: [push]
# jobs:
#   test:
#     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
#     steps:
#       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
#       - run: pip install -r requirements.txt
#       - run: pytest

skills.title: Structured Logging
skills.why: Structured logs enable efficient debugging and monitoring in production
skills.why_zh: 结构化日志能在生产环境中高效调试和监控
skills.minimum_code:
import logging
import json
from datetime import datetime

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

def log_event(event: str, **kwargs):
    entry = {'timestamp': datetime.utcnow().isoformat(), 'event': event, **kwargs}
    logger.info(json.dumps(entry))

skills.title: Monitoring
skills.why: Monitoring detects issues before users notice them
skills.why_zh: 监控能在用户发现之前检测到问题
skills.minimum_code:
from prometheus_client import Counter, Histogram

REQUEST_COUNT = Counter('http_requests_total', 'Total requests', ['method', 'status'])
REQUEST_LATENCY = Histogram('http_request_duration_seconds', 'Request latency')

def track_request(method: str, status: int, duration: float):
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method=method, status=status).inc()
    REQUEST_LATENCY.observe(duration)

skills.title: Testing Pyramid
skills.why: The testing pyramid (unit > integration > e2e) balances coverage and speed
skills.why_zh: 测试金字塔（单元 > 集成 > 端到端）平衡覆盖率和速度
skills.minimum_code:
import pytest

# Unit: fast, isolated
def test_parse_config():
    assert parse_config({'key': 'val'})['key'] == 'val'

# Integration: test components together
def test_api_endpoint(client):
    resp = client.get('/health')
    assert resp.status_code == 200

# E2E: test full flow
def test_full_workflow():
    result = run_pipeline('test input')
    assert result.status == 'success'
